generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current for the first axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data from physical robot sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data from physical robot sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for motor dynamics of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for gearwheel dynamics of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based modeling tool for structural representation of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of motor dynamics and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT communication protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for displaying robot state and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML for the MABI MAX 100 robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box friction models for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction identification results and robot state in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shells for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison for control algorithm adjustments"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of sensor data and simulation results for monitoring robot performance"
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Standardized asset metadata for system integration"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural representation of the robot axis components for system understanding"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control algorithms based on friction model parameters to improve robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and streaming for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating structural (SysML) and behavioral (Simulink) models with operational data and live sensor measurements for real-time friction identification and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), continuously updated with live data during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured data to assess model accuracy for friction identification, with deviation analysis as part of the purpose."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standards and SysML modeling language."
]
